title: Grappling Hook Gadget
description: A simple data pack that simulates the Grappling Hook gadget from Hypixel server.
body:
This simple data pack simulates the Grappling Hook gadget from Hypixel server. The grappling hook is based on a fishing rod. It basically gives you a momentum that pushes you horizontally towards your fishing bobber and vertically always upwards when you retrieve the rod. The grappling hook works in adventure, creative and survival mode. The further you away from the fishing bobber are, the bigger momentum you can get. Unlike vanilla fishing rods, the grappling hook only consumes maximal 1 durability however you use it. You will receive less fall damage from using grappling hooks. ## Commands 
/function grappling_hook_gadget:get
> Get a grappling hook. This item is currently only obtainable through commands.
